subjects.description: deep purple flower blossoming against a black backdrop
subjects.appearance_details: rich velvety purple petals, fine veins, detailed stamens, subtle pollen texture, and a saturated color edge against black
subjects.relationship: left or central flower paired with the pink bloom
subjects.location: foreground on the darker side of the black studio stage
subjects.relative_size: large macro subject filling much of the frame
subjects.orientation: angled slightly toward the pink flower and camera
subjects.pose: petals gradually unfolding from a partially closed bloom
subjects.action: opens its petals slowly, exposing stamens and velvety inner texture
subjects.state_changes: outer petals loosen; inner petals spread; stamens become visible
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: velvet-like petals, fine veins, soft pollen, and natural botanical texture
subjects.facial_features: central stamens, pistil, and layered petal geometry

subjects.description: soft pink flower unfolding beside the purple flower
subjects.appearance_details: pale pink translucent petals, delicate edges, fine stamens, gentle petal gradients, and an airy luminous quality
subjects.relationship: companion bloom contrasting with the darker purple flower
subjects.location: foreground beside the purple flower against the black backdrop
subjects.relative_size: large macro subject similar in scale to the purple flower
subjects.orientation: turned slightly toward the purple flower and camera
subjects.pose: delicate petals opening outward with soft curvature
subjects.action: unfurls gradually, revealing intricate stamens and layered petal structure
subjects.state_changes: bud expands; petals separate; pink translucency catches rim light
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: smooth soft petals, translucent edges, fine veins, and pollen detail
subjects.facial_features: central stamens, pistil, and radial petal pattern

background_setting: A stark black studio backdrop with no visible environment, creating a dramatic stage that isolates two blossoming flowers and emphasizes color, texture, and shape.

lighting.conditions: Controlled macro studio lighting with soft front fill, narrow rim highlights on petal edges, and subtle specular detail on stamens against pure black.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Controlled macro studio lighting with soft front fill, narrow rim highlights on petal edges, and subtle specular detail on stamens against pure black.

aesthetics.composition: Minimal botanical drama, high contrast color, velvety texture, delicate bloom motion, and sculptural floral composition.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Minimal botanical drama, high contrast color, velvety texture, delicate bloom motion, and sculptural floral composition.

cinematography.camera_motion: Static macro close-up with shallow depth of field, slight time-lapse quality in petal movement, and slow focus breathing across stamens and petal edges.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

artistic_style: Elegant studio botanical realism with dramatic black background and detailed natural textures.
context: Two flowers, one deep purple and one soft pink, bloom side by side on a black stage, revealing their petals and stamens in a quiet macro study.

actions.description: The purple and pink flowers appear partially closed against the black backdrop, lit by soft rim highlights.
Both flowers unfold their petals in slow motion, revealing detailed stamens and fine petal veins.
The blossoms reach a fuller open shape, with purple velvet texture and pink translucency glowing against black.

segments.description: Establish two partially closed blooms on a pure black background, one deep purple and one soft pink.
segments.key_changes: Petal tips begin to loosen and rim light outlines the forms.
segments.camera: Locked macro close-up with shallow depth of field.

segments.description: The flowers unfold slowly, showing layered petals, veins, stamens, and contrasting color textures.
segments.key_changes: Petals spread outward and the centers become visible.
segments.camera: Static macro with subtle rack focus from petal edges to stamens.

segments.description: Hold the fully expressive blossoms against the black stage, emphasizing vivid purple and soft pink detail.
segments.key_changes: Blooming completes and fine textures remain crisp under studio light.
segments.camera: Still close-up with minor focus breathing and no background movement.

temporal_caption: A deep purple flower and a soft pink flower slowly unfold their petals and stamens against a pure black backdrop.
audio_description: Near-silent studio ambience with a faint natural rustle impression and soft atmospheric tone.
